things.name: Umayyad Mosque
things.description: One of the oldest and most magnificent mosques in the world - built 705 AD on a Roman temple

things.name: Old City of Damascus (UNESCO)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage one of the world's oldest continuously inhabited cities

things.name: Souq al-Hamidiyya
things.description: Ottoman-era covered market - the finest surviving bazaar in the Arab world

things.name: National Museum of Damascus
things.description: Bronze Age artefacts, Palmyrene statues and the world-famous Ugaritic cuneiform tablets

things.name: Azm Palace
things.description: 18th-century Ottoman palace - the finest domestic architecture in Syria

things.name: Chapel of Ananias
things.description: Underground Roman house-church where Saint Paul was baptised

things.name: Straight Street (Via Recta)
things.description: The street called Straight from the Acts of the Apostles - still a living Old Testament reference

things.name: Sayyida Ruqayya Mosque
things.description: Magnificent Iranian-funded Shi'a mosque with stunning blue tilework and mirror mosaics

things.name: Maalula Village
things.description: Village where Biblical Aramaic - the language of Jesus - is still spoken

things.name: Kibbeh (Lamb & Bulgur)
things.description: Syria's most famous dish - oval shell of bulgur and lamb stuffed with pine nuts and spiced meat
